c.d: Whether the app supports multiple operating systems and devices to ensure seamless syncing
Options for organizing notes such as tags, notebooks, folders, or sections
Ability to share notes and collaborate with others in real time
Support for handwriting recognition, stylus input, and converting handwriting to text
Capability to add images, sketches, diagrams, audio, and videos to notes
Availability of free tiers, paid plans, or one-time purchases
How quickly and reliably the app syncs notes across devices
How simple and distraction-free the interface is for focused note-taking
